source.notes: Bug shape: on turn 1 (second turn of chapter), the bundle cache had been cleared by the Archivist after turn 0 (off-stage roster changed when 'Kess Toral' was promoted from prose to entity). The cache-miss path reset firstTurnIndex to history.turns.length === 1, dropping turn 0 from buildMessagesForNarrator's replay window. The Narrator received CONTINUATION mode + empty bundle Location/Atmosphere lines + zero prior assistant messages, hallucinated 'Prior scene: —', and emitted a meta-question instead of prose. Fix: firstTurnIndex now lives on world.sceneSnapshot, decoupled from cache lifecycle. A roster-only invalidation rebuilds bundle text but preserves the in-scene replay window.

turns.narratorProse: The settlement elder's quarters smell of rendered fat and old stone—a single room carved into the hillside. Kess Toral, the settlement elder, stands at the far side of the table.

input.playerInput: Ask Toral directly: which three adults are missing, and what happened to them.

narrator.prose: (unused — this fixture asserts on buildMessagesForNarrator output for the upcoming turn 1, not on a narrator response)

narratorMessages.playerInput: Ask Toral directly: which three adults are missing, and what happened to them.
